category.scope_note: Hand-held, transportable, and corded or cordless electric power tools exported from China to Chile, covering electrical safety certification, EMC, market access, noise handling, and restricted substances or battery treatment.

title.en: China-to-Chile Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入智利：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入智利：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Chile SEC electrical certification, NCh IEC standards, SUBTEL radio approval for cordless tools, noise handling, and restricted-substance treatment.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与智利 SEC 电气认证、NCh IEC 标准、无绳工具 SUBTEL 无线电核准、噪声处理及限用物质处理的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與智利 SEC 電氣認證、NCh IEC 標準、無繩工具 SUBTEL 無線電核准、噪聲處理及限用物質處理的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited-certifier assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Chilean SEC, INN NCh, SUBTEL, and Ministry of Energy requirements and enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可认证机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行智利 SEC、INN NCh、SUBTEL 及能源部要求及执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可認證機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行智利 SEC、INN NCh、SUBTEL 及能源部要求及執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Chile, the mandatory baseline is SEC electrical product certification through an authorized certifier against the applicable NCh IEC standards (commonly the NCh IEC 62841 series); cordless tools with radio modules also need SUBTEL type approval. Chile adopts IEC-based standards via INN but has no EU-style horizontal RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regime.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入智利，强制基线是通过授权认证机构、按适用 NCh IEC 标准（通常为 NCh IEC 62841 系列）完成 SEC 电气产品认证；带无线电模块的无绳工具还需 SUBTEL 型号核准。智利通过 INN 采用基于 IEC 的标准，但没有欧盟式的横向 RoHS、电池或户外噪声制度。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入智利，強制基線是通過授權認證機構、按適用 NCh IEC 標準（通常為 NCh IEC 62841 系列）完成 SEC 電氣產品認證；帶無線電模組的無繩工具還需 SUBTEL 型號核准。智利通過 INN 採用基於 IEC 的標準，但沒有歐盟式的橫向 RoHS、電池或戶外噪聲制度。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator, standards body, telecom authority, customs, or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
